name: Aya Ayano
description: One of the students in 3-3. She has a cheerful personality and speaks with Sakakibara in his first day in the school. She is also in the drama club, and good friends with Arita Matsuko and Izumi Akazawa.   ~!She dies in a car accident - when her family was trying to escape from Yomiyama. It was raining a lot, and soon when they were on a road that looked like highway - something hit the car's front glass, making the car drift off from the road, and falling into the nearest forest.!~
